com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.uart3

Class UART3Config

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.serialport.SerialPortSettings
      • com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.uart3.UART3Config
  • Deprecated. 
    This class is instead by SerialPortSettings.

    public class UART3Config
extends SerialPortSettings
    This class is used to record UART3 port configuration info.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      UART3Config(BaudRate baudRate, DataBits dataBits, ParityBit parityBit, StopBits stopBits)
      Deprecated. 
      Initializes a new instance of serial port settings using the specified baud rate, parity bit, data bits, and stop bits.
      UART3Config(BaudRate baudRate, DataBits dataBits, ParityBit parityBit, StopBits stopBits, boolean isBlocked)
      Deprecated.

    • Constructor Detail

      • UART3Config

        public UART3Config(BaudRate baudRate,
                   DataBits dataBits,
                   ParityBit parityBit,
                   StopBits stopBits)
        Deprecated. 
        Initializes a new instance of serial port settings using the specified baud rate, parity bit, data bits, and stop bits.
        Parameters:
        baudRate - Baud rate, see BaudRate
        dataBits - Data bits, see DataBits
        parityBit - Parity bit, see ParityBit
        stopBits - Stop bits, see StopBits

      • UART3Config

        public UART3Config(BaudRate baudRate,
                   DataBits dataBits,
                   ParityBit parityBit,
                   StopBits stopBits,
                   boolean isBlocked)
        Deprecated.
